violations.text: Candy was observed with rodent gnaw marks in the backstock room upstairs. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of candy at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the candy area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The 3-door refrigeration unit (non-dairy) was observed in poor repair in the retail area (frayed gasket). Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the racks in the dairy cooler has an accumulation of black residue and milk. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The floors in the upstairs storage area near the back entrance has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Wood is used in the construction of food storage shelves in the back storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

The floors throughout the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, debris, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
